hero_subline: Jeweller's savoir-faire, a creation that resembles you.
avantpropos_portrait_alt: Portrait of Emeline Le Ray, founder and jeweller of Précieuse
avantpropos_pair1_mais: Pieces designed to endure through time.
avantpropos_pair2_mais: Made to order, not necessarily one at a time.
avantpropos_pair3_mais: One hand, one atelier, one gesture, from sketch to setting.
avantpropos_pair4_mais: 18-carat gold with guaranteed traceability, precious stones chosen one by one.
matieres_section_subtitle: chosen one by one, with intention
etabli_overline: CHAPTER VII · THE PATH OF THE MATERIAL
surmesure_intro_paragraph: It all begins with a desire, a moment to mark, an idea to render. You tell me about yourself, I propose a sketch. Together, we refine the lines, choose the stones, the volumes. Then comes the time of making, in 18-carat gold, by hand, in my atelier in Bordeaux.
surmesure_intro_tagline: What is born is far more than a piece of jewellery: it is a bond.
surmesure_meta: On quotation · 8-week lead time · Secure handover
collection_intro: Five rings handcrafted in Bordeaux, made to be handed down. Each carries a story — yours begins here.
carnet_intro: Sketches, making-of stories, materials guides. Behind the scenes of a jewellery atelier in Bordeaux.
carnet_empty: No articles in this category yet.
creatrice_intro_lede: As an artisan jeweller, I craft the jewel of your dreams. Twelve years working with gold, every single day. It leaves its mark — and above all, savoir-faire.
creatrice_intro_portrait_alt: Emeline, artisan jeweller, in her atelier
creatrice_parcours_p1: Training in jewellery-making, then twelve years practising every technique day after day: lost-wax casting, stone-setting, hand polishing. Every ring I create passes through my hands, from the first sketch to the final polish.
creatrice_parcours_p2: It is demanding, it is precise, it is slow. And that is what makes every piece unique and enduring.
creatrice_parcours_image_alt: Two hands presenting an 18-carat gold ring — a gesture from the Précieuse atelier, Bordeaux
creatrice_philosophie_body: There are days of doubt. But it is in those very moments that I return to what matters most: creating jewellery that tells your story, that becomes a part of you. No compromise on the material, no shortcut on the savoir-faire. That is Précieuse: the transparency of craft, the trust of the gesture.
creatrice_philosophie_quote: “What no one sees behind a handcrafted jewel — and what no one has ever taken the time to explain to you.”
creatrice_real_title: The piece, and the life it takes on
creatrice_real_intro: Each creation photographed in the workshop, then worn by the woman it was made for.
contact_lede: A question, a longing for a ring? Emeline replies in person.
contact_success_body: Your message has arrived safely. I'll reply within 24 hours. É.
contact_reassurance: Reply within 48h · Payment after we talk · Bordeaux, 18k gold
contact_faq_q1: How long for a bespoke piece?
contact_faq_a1: 4 to 8 weeks, from first sketch to the case.
contact_faq_a2: Bank transfer or PayPal, after our conversation — never an impulse buy.
contact_renvoi: Have a specific bespoke project in mind?
sm_hero_sub: A piece designed with you, hand-cast in Bordeaux, made to outlast time.
sm_hero_photo_alt: Précieuse ring in 18-carat gold worn on the hand
sm_about_body: Behind each piece, a deeply human approach and expert hands. Emeline listens, draws, shapes. Everything is made in France, in her Bordeaux atelier, where she casts 18-carat gold by the lost-wax method.
sm_step1_body: We talk about you, the occasion, what moves you.
sm_step2_body: Two or three hand sketches, refined together.
sm_step3_body: Stone, volumes, finishes: every detail approved with you.
sm_step4_body: Lost-wax casting, 18-carat gold, hand-set, in Bordeaux.
sm_manifeste_lead: I don't sell jewellery. I help you create your own. Designed for you, shaped by hand, made to
sm_split_body: It all starts with a conversation: your story, your style. Together, we sketch, draw, adjust, until a unique piece, ready to wear (and to move you).
sm_split_img_alt: Pencil sketches of an amethyst ring resting on the workbench
sm_real_title: The piece, and the life it takes on
sm_real_intro: Each creation photographed at the atelier, then worn by the one it was born for.
sm_voice1_quote: Emeline is quite simply an artist. The result is beyond what I had imagined. I am moved and thrilled.
sm_voice2_quote: Very happy with your creation for my ring. Professional, lovely. I recommend without hesitation.
sm_voice3_quote: You feel in every piece the time spent, the precision, the love of the craft. Still just as beautiful two years on.
newsletter_title: Three letters a year, from the atelier.
newsletter_short_subtitle: Three letters a year from the atelier.
